description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Preview Build that triggers on every pull request. In a single ubuntu-latest job, check out the code, set up multiple .NET versions (5.0.100, 6.0.101, 7.0.100, 8.0.100) and Node.js 16.x, prepare the AOT workload, build a site with .NET and npm, and upload the site artifact and PR number as separate artifacts.
